intent: 2BR / 2 baths clustered + mid-band HALL — UPPER band, NO CARPORT. 13x12.5 lot gives a 9x8.5 envelope = 76.5 m² floor (clean rectangle, no L-cut). Master ensuite + common bath share a wet-core plumbing wall; bath block + hallway sit between master (front) and standard (rear). Hall has an open mouth into the great_room; bedrooms and the common bath all open onto it.
must_haves: clustered baths (ensuite + common share a plumbing wall)
private-wing hallway serving master, standard, and common bath
